attributes.preview:
# Manuscript Redline Diff — Strengthening Pass v1
**Base:** `feat/mbd4-rxiv-manuscript-942-baseline` → `rxiv/manuscript.md`
**Target:** `manuscript_v2.md`
**Date:** 2026-04-27
**Scope:** 5 targeted edits. No Results restructuring. No new figures. Core signal unchanged.

---

## CHANGE INVENTORY

| # | Location | Type | Summary |
|---|---|---|---|
| C1 | Abstract, line 8 | Rounding fix | "−0.74" → "−0.73" |
| C2 | Fig 2 caption | Rounding fix | "0.74 log-unit shift" → "0.73 log-unit shift" |
| C3 | Methods → Confound stress testing | New paragraph | MSI dual-definition sensitivity note |
| C4 | Results → Stress Test 1 | New sentence | MSI sensitivity analysis denominator note |
| C5 | Discussion | New paragraph | A9 pan-cancer benchmark context (after PARP1 paragraph, before combinatorial framework) |
| C6 | Discussion | New paragraph | Explicit Limitations section (before References) |

---

## CHANGE C1 — Abstract rounding fix

**Location:** Abstract, sentence beginning "MBD4-LOF lines show significantly enhanced sensitivity..."

~~MBD4-LOF lines show significantly enhanced sensitivity to the ATR inhibitor ceralasertib (AZD6738) (LN_IC50 Δ=**−0.74**, p=0.021, Cohen's d=−0.50; n=14 True-LOF vs 942 WT; GDSC2)~~

**→** MBD4-LOF lines show significantly enhanced sensitivity to the ATR inhibitor ceralasertib (AZD6738) (LN_IC50 Δ=**−0.73**, p=0.021, Cohen's d=−0.50; n=14 True-LOF vs 942 WT; GDSC2)

**Rationale:** Full-precision value is −0.7325 (canonical_atr_wee1_rerun.json). "−0.74" rounds away from the true value; "−0.73" is the correct two-significant-figure representation. The Results table correctly retains "−0.736" (three s.f.) and is unchanged.

---

~~The MBD4-LOF group shows a **0.74** log-unit shift toward sensitivity (p=0.021, Cohen's d=−0.50, one-sided Mann-Whitney U test).~~
